dates: Jan 31 - Feb 9 (Part I), March 11 - March 29 (Part II)
key_events: Interim Budget presented, JPC on Waqf Bill
text: Budget Session 2024: Jan 31 to March 29 (in two parts). Interim Budget presented by FM Nirmala Sitharaman. 7 bills passed. Key: JPC on Waqf Amendment Bill constituted. Both Houses sat for combined 48 productive days.

key_events: 18th Lok Sabha first session, Speaker election, NEET debate
text: Monsoon Session 2024: July 22 to August 9. First session of 18th Lok Sabha. Om Birla re-elected Speaker. 5 bills passed including Finance Bill. Major debates on NEET examination controversy.
Winter Session 2023: Dec 4 to Dec 21. Marred by Parliament security breach on Dec 13 anniversary. Record 146 opposition MPs suspended. 4 bills passed including Telecommunications Act 2023.

key_events: Women's Reservation Bill (Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam) passed, shift to new Parliament building
text: Special Session 2023: Sept 18-22. Historic: Shifted to new Parliament building. Women's Reservation Bill (Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam) passed — 33% seats reserved for women in Lok Sabha and State Assemblies.

key_events: Union Budget 2023-24 with ₹45 lakh crore expenditure, Digital Personal Data Protection Bill intro
text: Budget Session 2023: Jan 31 to March 29. Union Budget 2023-24 presented — ₹45 lakh crore expenditure. 11 bills passed. Digital Personal Data Protection Bill introduced. Adani-Hindenburg debate in opposition.

key_events: Union Budget 2025-26 presented, income tax reforms
text: Budget Session 2025 Part I: Jan 31 to Feb 13. Union Budget 2025-26 presented by FM Nirmala Sitharaman. Major income tax reform — new slab with no tax up to ₹12 lakh. 3 bills introduced in first part.

key_events: Manipur violence debate, Digital Personal Data Protection Bill passed, Delhi Services Bill
text: Monsoon Session 2023: July 20 to Aug 11. 7 bills passed including Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023, Delhi Services Bill. Intense debate on Manipur ethnic violence. 25 hours lost to disruptions.

key_events: B.R. Ambedkar tribute controversy, Opposition protests
text: Winter Session 2024: Nov 25 to Dec 20. 4 bills passed. Major controversy over B.R. Ambedkar references. Opposition protests led to significant disruptions. Both Houses saw low productivity due to standoffs.
